vocab.meaning: nhìn chằm chằm một cách ngớ ngẩn (vì quá ngạc nhiên hoặc ngưỡng mộ)
vocab.example: I often find myself gawping at the sheer height of skyscrapers before I even think to take my camera out.

vocab.meaning: mọc lên, xuất hiện bất ngờ (thường nói về các tòa nhà mới)
vocab.example: There are so many modern art galleries popping up around the city lately, and they make for fantastic photographic subjects.

vocab.meaning: che khuất (ánh sáng hoặc tầm nhìn)
vocab.example: I like to capture how massive apartment blocks can block out the sun, creating dramatic shadows across the street.

vocab.meaning: nhận ra hoặc làm nổi bật một chi tiết nhỏ trong một tổng thể
vocab.example: With a good macro lens, you can pick out the tiny, intricate carvings on the facade of historical buildings.

vocab.meaning: phân vân, do dự giữa hai lựa chọn
vocab.example: It's often a toss-up between taking a wide-angle shot of the whole plaza or focusing on just one balcony.

vocab.meaning: cao hơn hẳn, bao trùm lên những thứ xung quanh
vocab.example: I love the contrast when an old, tiny cottage is towered over by giant, glass financial centers.

vocab.meaning: tận hưởng, đắm mình trong (bầu không khí)
vocab.example: I usually spend a few minutes just soaking up the grandeur of a cathedral before I start snapping photos.
I always try to get onto rooftops that look out over the city skyline to get the best architectural shots.
The city council has freshened up many colonial buildings with new paint, making them much more vibrant in photos.

vocab.meaning: chỉ ra, lưu ý về một điều gì đó
vocab.example: My architect friend often points out hidden structural details that I would have otherwise ignored in my photography.
